name: ExpressVPN
tagline: Premium VPN with best-in-class privacy and speed
description: ExpressVPN offers the most polished VPN experience with excellent speeds, top-tier privacy, and the best streaming support in the industry.
longDescription: ExpressVPN has long been the gold standard for premium VPN services. While it's the most expensive option on our list, it justifies the premium with best-in-class speed, an exceptionally polished user experience across all platforms, and a proven track record of protecting user privacy. The company's TrustedServer technology (RAM-only servers) ensures no data can ever be stored on physical hard drives, and their Lightway protocol delivers outstanding performance. ExpressVPN operates in the British Virgin Islands, outside of any intelligence-sharing alliances, and has had its no-logs policy validated through multiple independent audits and real-world court cases where they had no data to hand over.
pros: Excellent speeds across all server locations
Best-in-class streaming support (Netflix, Hulu, BBC, Disney+)
RAM-only servers (TrustedServer) — no data ever touches a hard drive
Proven privacy in real-world court cases
Polished, beginner-friendly apps on every platform
cons: Most expensive VPN on this list

keyFeatures.name: TrustedServer Technology
keyFeatures.description: Every server runs entirely on RAM, meaning all data is wiped on every reboot. No hard drives means nothing can ever be physically stored or seized.

keyFeatures.name: Lightway Protocol
keyFeatures.description: Custom-built VPN protocol designed for speed, security, and reliability. Open-source and audited, it establishes connections up to 2.5x faster than OpenVPN.

keyFeatures.name: Network Lock (Kill Switch)
keyFeatures.description: Advanced kill switch that blocks all internet traffic if the VPN connection drops unexpectedly. Prevents any data leaks even during network interruptions.

keyFeatures.name: Device Groups
keyFeatures.description: Organize your devices into groups and connect each group to different VPN locations. Perfect for households with different streaming needs.

verdict: ExpressVPN is the best choice for users who prioritize a premium, hassle-free experience and are willing to pay more for it. The polished apps, excellent streaming support, and proven privacy track record make it our runner-up pick. We recommend it especially for beginners and those who primarily use VPN for streaming.

faqs.question: Is ExpressVPN worth the higher price?
faqs.answer: For many users, yes. The premium price buys you the most polished VPN experience available: best-in-class apps, proven privacy protections (validated in real court cases), and consistently excellent streaming performance. If you value a hassle-free experience and can afford $6.67/month, ExpressVPN delivers. Budget-conscious users should consider NordVPN or Surfshark.

faqs.question: How fast is ExpressVPN compared to competitors?
faqs.answer: In our speed tests across 50+ servers, ExpressVPN consistently ranks in the top 3. We recorded an average speed loss of just 12% on nearby servers and 24% on long-distance connections. The Lightway protocol is particularly impressive, establishing connections in under 1 second and maintaining stable speeds even on high-latency connections.

awards.label: Best Premium VPN 2026
awards.description: Best-in-class user experience and proven privacy

author.name: Sarah Mitchell
author.title: Senior Tech Reviewer
author.bio: Sarah has been evaluating VPN services and cybersecurity products for 7 years. She specializes in streaming performance testing and privacy policy analysis.
